data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Russia's Gold Reserves Reach 74.1 Million Ounces
data.description: Russia's central bank has reported that as of April 1, the country's gold reserves totaled 74.1 million ounces. According to Jin10, this figure reflects Russia's ongoing strategy to bolster its gold holdings amid global economic uncertainties. The accumulation of gold reserves is seen as a measure to enhance financial stability and reduce reliance on foreign currencies. This move aligns with Russia's broader economic policies aimed at strengthening its position in the global market.

data.title: Tangem Launches Tangem Pay for USDC Transactions via Visa Cards
data.description: Tangem has introduced Tangem Pay, a retail payment service enabling wallet users to spend USDC through virtual Visa cards at any location accepting Visa. According to NS3.AI, Polygon will facilitate on-chain settlement and cover gas fees during the initial rollout phase. The service is currently available in the U.S., excluding certain states, as well as in Latin America and select Asia-Pacific countries.

data.title: Meta Platforms and CBRE Launch 'LevelUp' Initiative to Train Thousands of Technicians for U.S. Data Centers
data.description: Meta Platforms has partnered with CBRE to introduce the 'LevelUp' program, a multi-year initiative aimed at recruiting and training thousands of technicians to support the development of Meta's data centers across the United States. According to Jin10, this strategic collaboration seeks to enhance Meta's infrastructure capabilities by equipping a new workforce with the necessary skills to manage and operate advanced data center technologies. The program underscores Meta's commitment to expanding its technological footprint and fostering job creation within the tech industry.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Hyatt Hotels Group Deploys ChatGPT Enterprise
data.description: Hyatt Hotels Group has implemented ChatGPT Enterprise, according to Jin10. This deployment marks a significant step in integrating advanced AI technologies within the hospitality industry. ChatGPT Enterprise is expected to enhance customer service and operational efficiency by providing real-time assistance and data-driven insights. The move aligns with Hyatt's strategy to leverage cutting-edge technology to improve guest experiences and streamline processes. As AI continues to evolve, more companies in the hospitality sector are likely to adopt similar solutions to stay competitive and meet the growing expectations of tech-savvy travelers.

data.title: Strategy has paper losses of approximately $195 million, and Bitmine has paper losses of approximately $6.39 billion.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, Strategy currently holds 815,061 BTC, with a total value of approximately $61.363 billion, an average cost of approximately $75,527, a paper loss of approximately $195 million, and a decline of approximately 0.3%. Ethereum treasury company Bitmine currently holds 4,976,485 ETH, with a total value of approximately $11.505 billion, an average cost of approximately $3,596, a paper loss of approximately $6.39 billion, and a decline of approximately 35.7%.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Adobe's AI Assistant to Boost Customer Engagement and Sales, Wall Street Journal Reports
data.description: Adobe's artificial intelligence assistant is set to enhance customer engagement and drive sales, according to the Wall Street Journal. The company plans to collaborate with Microsoft, Anthropic, OpenAI, and Nvidia to integrate advanced AI capabilities into its offerings. This strategic partnership aims to leverage cutting-edge technology to improve user experience and expand market reach.

data.title: AI Wallet Infrastructure Poised to Become Key Execution Layer
data.description: A new development in the AI sector is set to transform the landscape of digital wallets. According to PANews, while not an AI standard itself, this innovation is likely to become a crucial execution infrastructure in the era of 'AI+ Wallets.' The advancement promises to integrate artificial intelligence capabilities with digital wallet functionalities, potentially revolutionizing how transactions and data management are handled in the digital economy. Experts suggest that this could lead to more efficient and secure financial operations, paving the way for enhanced user experiences and streamlined processes. As the technology evolves, it is expected to play a significant role in shaping the future of digital finance.

data.title: Bitcoin Rebounds 25% Amid Bullish Indicators
data.description: Bitcoin has experienced a 25% rebound after falling below $60,000. According to NS3.AI, analysts have highlighted bullish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) and Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicators. However, experts caution that Bitcoin must reclaim the $78,000 level to maintain its upward momentum and avoid a potential bull trap.

data.title: Palm Oil Futures Rise Amid Strong Crude Oil and Biodiesel Policy Expectations
data.description: Palm oil futures have experienced an increase, driven by the strengthening of crude oil prices and anticipated biodiesel policy changes. According to Jin10, despite this upward trend, data indicates a significant decline in palm oil exports for the first 20 days of April compared to the previous month. The sustainability of this price rise remains uncertain as market participants assess the impact of export figures on future movements.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Output Declines for Ionic Digital in March
data.description:
Bitcoin mining company Ionic Digital reported a production of 28.05 BTC in March, marking a 14.9% decrease from the previous month. According to Odaily, the company's average daily hash rate was 2.04 EH/s, which is a 19.4% decline compared to February.

The company stated that it did not sell any Bitcoin during March and continues to maintain a zero-debt structure. As of March 31, Ionic Digital's Bitcoin holdings increased to 2,815.6 BTC, an addition of approximately 28.2 BTC from the previous month.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Adobe Launches CX Enterprise Service
data.description: Adobe has introduced a new enterprise agency service called CX Enterprise, according to the Wall Street Journal. This service aims to enhance customer experience management for businesses by leveraging Adobe's advanced technologies and solutions. The launch is part of Adobe's ongoing efforts to expand its offerings in the enterprise sector, providing tailored services to meet the evolving needs of large organizations.

data.title: Ionic Digital's mining output decreased by 14.9% month-over-month in March, while its holdings increased to 2,815 BTC.
data.description: Bitcoin mining company Ionic Digital produced 28.05 BTC in March, a 14.9% decrease month-over-month, with an average daily hashrate of 2.04 EH/s, down 19.4% month-over-month. The company stated that it did not sell any Bitcoin in March and maintains a zero-debt structure. As of March 31, its Bitcoin holdings increased to 2815.6 BTC, an increase of approximately 28.2 BTC from the previous month. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Tom Lee: The crypto bear market is nearing its end; ETH benefits from asset tokenization and AI narratives.
data.description: Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee stated that market signs indicate the current "crypto winter" is nearing its end. He pointed out that ETH has rebounded by approximately 41% since its early February lows, outperforming the S&P 500 in recent times. He believes Ethereum is currently benefiting primarily from two narratives: the advancement of tokenization of traditional financial assets and the increasing demand for public blockchain infrastructure from AI systems. Furthermore, he noted that historically, crypto bear markets have often been accompanied by significant stock market corrections, and the current changes in the macroeconomic environment may indicate that this cycle is nearing its end. (Prnewswire)

data.title: Global listed companies saw a strong rebound in BTC buying, with net purchases exceeding $2.5 billion in a single week, setting a new recent high.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, as of 8:00 AM ET on April 20, 2026, global listed companies (excluding mining companies) saw a net purchase of $2.542 billion in Bitcoin last week, an increase of 154.2% compared to the previous week. Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) announced an investment of $2.54 billion (a 154% increase from the previous week) to purchase 34,164 Bitcoins at a price of $74,395, bringing its total holdings to 815,061 Bitcoins. Japanese listed company Metaplanet did not purchase any Bitcoin last week. In addition, four other companies purchased Bitcoin last week. On April 15, US asset management company Strive announced the purchase of 27 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 13,768 bitcoins; the specific purchase amount was not disclosed. On April 16, Japanese fashion brand ANAP invested $410,000 to acquire 5.07 bitcoins at a price of $81,607.50, bringing its total holdings to 1,422.1041 bitcoins. On April 14, UK-based Bitcoin company The Smarter Web Company announced an investment of $800,000 to purchase 11 bitcoins at a price of $72,702, bringing its total holdings to 2,706 bitcoins. On April 20, a French Bitcoin company announced an investment of $920,000 to purchase 12 bitcoins at a price of $72,102.50, bringing its total holdings to 2,937 bitcoins. As of press time, the total number of Bitcoins held by listed companies worldwide (excluding mining companies) is 1,081,576, an increase of 3.28% compared to last week, with a current market value of approximately US$81.65 billion, accounting for 5.4% of Bitcoin's circulating market capitalization.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | International Spot Gold Faces Challenges Amid Geopolitical Tensions
data.description: International spot gold is currently addressing a significant gap in market positioning, which emerged due to escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend. According to Jin10, while some progress has been made in closing this gap, the situation remains uncertain and requires further observation. Meanwhile, international spot silver is experiencing a downward trend in its rebound attempts, with its peak points gradually declining. The market is closely monitoring the ability to sustain these levels amid ongoing challenges.

data.title: BitMine Increases Ethereum Holdings, Reaches 4.12% of Total Supply
data.description: BitMine has recently expanded its Ethereum holdings by acquiring an additional 101,627 ETH. According to Foresight News, as of April 19, 2026, the company's total Ethereum holdings have reached 4,976,485 ETH, representing approximately 4.12% of the total Ethereum supply. BitMine's portfolio, which includes cryptocurrencies, cash, and other investment assets, is valued at approximately $12.9 billion. This includes $1.12 billion in cash, 199 Bitcoin, $200 million in equity assets from Beast Industries, and a $107 million investment in Eightco Holdings (ORBS). Furthermore, BitMine has staked 3,334,637 ETH, valued at around $7.7 billion, with an annualized staking yield of approximately $221 million.

data.title: Bitmine increased its holdings by 101,627 ETH last week, its largest increase in nearly four months.
data.description: According to official sources, Bitmine added 101,627 ETH last week, marking its fastest accumulation since the week of December 15, 2025.

data.title: Philippine Central Bank Monitors Inflation Risks Amid Global Oil Supply Shocks
data.description: The Philippine Central Bank has highlighted recent pressures on oil prices as stemming from global supply shocks. According to Jin10, the bank remains vigilant regarding the potential spillover effects and the risk of inflation expectations becoming unanchored. The central bank's focus is on maintaining stability in the face of these external economic pressures.

data.title: DefiLlama founder responds to Aave TVL controversy: Revolving lending impact has been eliminated.
data.description: DefiLlama founder 0xngmi stated in an article on the X platform that current claims about Aave TVL being overvalued due to revolving lending are inaccurate. He explained that in TVL statistics, lent assets are excluded, therefore revolving lending does not inflate the total locked value. For example, deposited assets are counted in TVL, while the corresponding lent portion is offset. He further added that DefiLlama had previously eliminated double counting caused by Ethena-related collateralized revolving lending, and believes the related allegations lack basis.

data.title: Germany Advocates for EU Carbon Market Review Amid Energy Transition
data.description: Germany is urging the European Union to prioritize the industrial shift towards cleaner energy in its upcoming review of the carbon market. Bloomberg posted on X that this move comes in response to increasing power and fuel prices, which have sparked criticism of the EU's primary climate strategy. The review aims to address these concerns and ensure the carbon market effectively supports the transition to sustainable energy sources.
